*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Burn to Left upper arm / Measures 1.3 cm x 2.3 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. Odor present. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 1.3 cm x 2.3 cm x 0.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 48% slough, 52% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Continue current dressing regimen.
